title: Single cell RNA sequencing of preimplantation bovine embryos grown under different oxygen levels
author: Boskovic, Nina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We utilised STRTN-seq, a newly optimised single cell 5'end RNA sequencing method to understand the development of bovine preimplantation embryos under different oxygen concnetrations. Here, the raw BCL files can be found. Preprocessing protocol of the raw data can be found at:  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xpro.2023.102357
steps_raw: We utilised STRTN-seq, a newly optimised single cell 5'end RNA sequencing method to understand the development of bovine preimplantation embryos under different oxygen concnetrations. Here, the raw BCL files can be found. Preprocessing protocol of the raw data can be found at:  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xpro.2023.102357
